title: passiflora cumbalensis var. goudotiana
intro: Passiflora cumbalensis var. goudotiana, a variety of the Passiflora genus, is a type of flowering plant native to South America, belonging to the passionflower family (Passifloraceae). The medicinal properties of Passiflora cumbalensis var. goudotiana lie in its ability to have a sedative effect on the nervous system, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and alkaloids. This plant is known to provide various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, promoting better sleep, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia. The plant is commonly prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
